title: Executable NAND direct-wire semantics seed specification
purpose: Define a small executable semantics for NAND direct-wire words, open carriers, boundary tuples, constants, gates, output tuples, truth-table evaluation, replacement equivalence, and size.
coveredConcepts: word size as NAND gate count
compatible replacement semantics for same boundary and output arity

wordSchema.boundary: ordered array of unique boundary variable names

semanticDefinitions.evaluationOrder: gates are evaluated in the listed order; a gate source may reference only a boundary, constant, or earlier gate
semanticDefinitions.openFunction: the truth table induced by all assignments to the ordered boundary tuple and the ordered output tuple
semanticDefinitions.size: the number of NAND gates in the direct-wire word
semanticDefinitions.equivalence: two words are equivalent when they have identical boundary tuples, identical output arity, and identical output bit-vectors for every boundary assignment
semanticDefinitions.replacement: a replacement is compatible when it has the same boundary tuple and output arity as the support word and is truth-table equivalent

seedExamples.description: single NAND gate over two boundary bits
